notes: Three addressable pose textures for GameplayScene swap. trump-bound-a and trump-bound-b are alternating stride frames from running-6-frames animation (frames 1 and 4) — visually distinct at thumbnail size, swap at 250 ms to read as bounding locomotion. trump-chomp is the peak lunge frame from cross-punch animation (frame 4) — body fully committed forward, arms extended, reads as catching/grabbing; locks as frozen frame on game-over. Character is slightly bulkier than Leila on-screen, same 68x68 canvas, chibi proportions, orange skin/hair, dark suit, tie-red power tie.
